  "findings": [
    "Kick-out flashing is missing at the roof-wall intersection.",
    "Sequence violation: WRB and siding installation cannot proceed over this junction without the kick-out flashing installed first."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt siding and WRB integration at the roof-wall intersection.",
    "Install the kick-out flashing diverted into the gutter line per manufacturer instructions and IRC R703.8.",
    "Integrate the WRB over the flashing shingle-lap style before proceeding with exterior finishes."
  ],
  "rationale": "The kick-out flashing must be installed before the WRB and siding are integrated at the roof-wall intersection to ensure proper water shedding and prevent water intrusion into the wall cavity. Proceeding without it is a critical sequence violation.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R703.8",
    "IRC R703.1.1",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions for WRB and flashing"
  ]
}
